news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Focused Growth ETF (FFOG)

holdings.infoBox: FFOG is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.65%, Alphabet at 9.08%, Amazon.com at 8.71%, Microsoft at 5.49%, and Apple at 5.17%.

overview.description: The Franklin Focused Growth ETF FOCUSED GROWTH ETF (FFOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in equities perceived to have strong fundamentals and prospects for growth. The fund does not limit investments to any particular market-cap, industry or geography. FFOG was launched on Apr 13, 2016 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Big Tech ETF Exposure With Franklin Focused Growth ETF (FFOG)
data.text: Spot Bitcoin ETFs have been trading for 3 weeks. David Mann discusses how to get exposure to big tech with Franklin Focused Growth ETF (FFOG).

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Focused Growth ETF (FFOG)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today launched Franklin Focused Growth ETF on CBOE under the ticker FFOG. FFOG aims to provide capital appreciation by investing in growth equity...
